review_text: Very quiet and has everything!! We will be back

Monica was such a life saver, I messed up my dates she called to double check and fixed it for me super easy. She was flexible as our arrival was quite late. Cabins were clean and comfortable. Definitely recommend.
Very small sites, with cars parked in front it extremely tight to get in and out, a couple of Vans near us had to ask patrons to move cars to get hitched and get out.

Booked the Budget Double Room. Clean & tidy but old and worn. No tea towel or dish sponge to wash dishes. I donated my dish sponge. Short stair entry no grab rail.
Think I should have paid the extra for a better room.

Koonwarra family holidays Park
Good service! Good people!
I recommend to everyone!!
Cheers
Con.

Our family stayed at Koonwarra Holiday Park, renting a Superior Villa and a one-bedroom apartment, and we had a wonderful experience. The park is clean, well maintained, and centrally located, which made getting around Lakes Entrance easy.
My girls absolutely loved the pool and the arcade ❤️
A special mention to Monica, who was incredibly helpful. She even called to let me know that someone from the market had contacted the park after an iPad was left at their stall. It turned out to belong to my father-in-law, and thanks to her, it was safely returned. We’re very grateful.
We’ll always consider staying here for our annual Lakes Entrance getaway.

Good experience overall  :

Our Luxury Villa was good, Monica was helpful , she answered all queries and also help in providing early check-in. Really thanks to her for all the support.
Location was good.
Holiday Park was good.
Arcade could be better. but kept kids busy.

some shortfalls:
The Swimming pool was very small ( Kind of limited or no use).
Kids play area was of no use ( old and not maintained).
Very less Kids activities/ playing area.
Internet was of no use.
Arcade could be upgraded and can have some free games for kids

Reply Back to response:
I already said thank you for helping in providing early check-in and all support.
we have used our home quits for us, normally we carry our quite/sheets whenever we go to any holiday home. ( Did not touch Cabins one)
Thanks again, It was nice stay.
Excellent location close to main attractions but natural feel. Friendly and helpful staff. Highly recommend.
I stay here every year I own a cabin here
Amazing service, I greatly appreciate that when me and my son got locked out of our cabin,the staff was there to help out.

Flimsy cabins with thin walls for very little privacy, no wifi for cabins at all. Pool with time restrictions so you can’t go whenever you want. Games room you have to pay for each individual game. But at least the location is easily accessible to popular areas.
Best place. Extremely clean and friendly 👌

I stayed here with my two dogs in a dog friendly capin,not fancy,but perfectly equipped for our needs.very clean and cosy. The facilities at this park are excellent and so close to walking paths and play areas for people with dogs or love to walk .would thoroughly recommend staying here, owners very welcoming in a safe environment 👍
Great hospitality and service, clean rooms and beautiful grounds

Our stay at this holiday park was hands down the best experience I’ve ever had — if I could give it 1000 stars, I absolutely would! It’s a hidden treasure. The amenities are exceptionally clean, and Bill and Monica are some of the kindest, most welcoming people you’ll ever meet. The games room is incredible — whether you’re a kid or an adult, you’ll be amazed. This place is a true gem, and I couldn’t recommend it highly enough!
Located 2 mins drive to the centre of Lakes entrance. Everything was good, but felt the owners can be bit more friendly than showing plain strictness.

We had an amazing stay at Koonwarra Family Holiday Park, made even better by the incredible managers, Bill and Monica. From the moment we arrived, they made us feel completely welcome warm, friendly, and always happy to help with anything we needed. Whether it was sharing local tips, making sure the kids felt at home, or just stopping for a friendly chat, they truly went above and beyond to create a relaxed, family friendly atmosphere. You can tell they genuinely care about the park and every guest who stays there. Thanks to Bill and Monica, our holiday felt personal, memorable, and full of positive energy, we can’t wait to come back!

We recently stayed at Koonwarra Holiday Park, and it was an absolutely wonderful experience! From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with warm hospitality that set the tone for our entire stay. The park itself is incredibly well-maintained, with lush greenery and a peaceful, family-friendly atmosphere that made it the perfect place to unwind.
Our cabin was spotless, comfortable, and well-equipped with everything we needed for a relaxing stay. The beds were incredibly comfy. The outdoor area was perfect for relaxing with a cup of coffee in the morning or enjoying a BBQ in the evening.
The park's facilities were top-notch, from the sparkling clean pool to the well-kept playground for the kids. It’s clear that the team at Koonwarra takes pride in providing a great experience for guests, no matter their age.
The location is also fantastic—close enough to explore the local area and beaches, but far enough to enjoy some peace and quiet away from the hustle and bustle. We left feeling refreshed and rejuvenated, and we’ll definitely be back for another stay!
Thank you, Koonwarra Holiday Park, for an unforgettable experience!
We enjoyed a lovely stay in a 3 bedroom cabin for a week in the school holidays. Management very friendly and location is amazing!

I was overcharged and promised a refund, but the manager became abusive and refused it after I complained about bugs in the room. She hung up on me mid-call. I waited until 4pm for check-in, only to be told the room was ready at 2pm and blamed for not calling earlier. The place is filthy, run-down, and infested with insects — repellent sprays were in the room. I booked directly and was treated with disrespect. She was rude, dismissive, and refused to speak further. After 50 years of travel, this was my worst experience in Australia. Avoid this place.
They said there was internet for my 5 kids there is not too weak to connect kids very angry wife very angry so im very stuffed

Glad to have dog friendly cabin but goodness me there are limits. The most uncomfortable terrible mattress ever. I hardly slept. Definitely needs replacing. Not even a biscuit  and  only stale tea on offer. Overall it's a bit tired and needs an update. Hope it improves.
The whole family enjoyed this park.  Especially the kids.
Great place that allowed my small dogs to stay with me while I broke my journey for a night

A lovely park. Accommodation was a fantastic price, and the option to bring pets is a huge plus. The budget cabin was just that, but who’s to complain with 2 nights get 1 free deal? If we stay in lakes again we’ll be back here!

Koonwarra Family Holiday Park
Has set the Bar, as a fish-o-holic Lakes Entrance is my favourite place to fish. I've stayed in many places in Lakes, and I have honest Koonwarra Family Holiday Park is by far the best budget-friendly The cabins are spot on very very comfortable, clean, beds are comfortable, the bathroom is very clean and big the bath-towels are super large
All up definitely ***** stars from me, that's from my personal experience.

Rooms are starting to get quite dated, smelled extremely strong of cleaning chemicals on arrival and needed to be aired out. Lovely staff at check in, entire park showing signs of being dated/tired including kids playground with rotted wood and lots of weeds.
Cabin was ok but run out of hot water after one quick shower
Great, friendly hosts. Booking is easy and hassle free. Stayed multiple times would definitely be back.

We had a 2 bedroom villa, very clean and well presented. Split systems in main living and main bedroom. 2 toilets, 1 downstairs 1 upstairs with the bedrooms. Laundry room available on ground level. Cutlery, plates, cups provided with cooking pans (in excellent condition). This resort also has a games room and pool (not heated) and is located a good walk out of town across the road from the 'lake', a very good spot!
We parked our travel van overnight. A quiet place. Facilities were great. Well equipped kitchen. The hosts, Monica and Bill, are the best!

Had a quick stay here. Friendly staff who stayed up for our late arrival. Very  informative on the area as a local. Clean, neat & tidy cottage, comfortable beds. Family friendly! Hot showers, full size fridge and ample room for families with bunks/double bunk bed facilities!

Absolutely terrible, nasty and rude caretaker. Came for a nice time away with my family and parents, place was empty, and there were empty sites everywhere. During the day I didnt mind parking my car outside in the car park. However, after going for a walk over the road we noticed shady looking men loitering at the waters edge. After tea I parked my car off the main road, to keep it safe. I only did this at night. During the day I don't care.

We figured the place is empty, there were hardly any customers, so who does it bother? If it was busy, sure i understand.

Boy was I wrong.

The caretaker came, banged on our door and said rules "is" rules and demanded I take my car back out and park it on the main road. We asked if we could leave the car on the empty lot over night, one of many, but the guy said no and demanded I to move it out.

After some back and forth with the caretaker I could see he was unreasonable and arrogant, so I did as directed and move it out. My car is now on a main road in an at risk area.

If I had known before booking that parking would be an issue, I would have booked a elsewhere.

The guy said someone else had parked their car out of the park... where??? Not in the carpark I am forced to use. See photos attached.

Not happy at all.

Remove the male caretaker and its quite a nice place.

I definitely wouldn't recommend.

Post response review shows just how awful these people are. The area asked to park on was shire land not yours, hence the powerpoles. The area I did park in says visitor parking with an arrow pointing to it. The youth were definitely not fishing. We actually felt unsafe. Your name around town is herendous for the way you treat people.

Go on a holiday to have a good time to put up with this attitude and aggressiveness. If I could have rated lower I would have.

A Disturbing and Traumatic Experience — Not Safe for Families

Our time at Koonwarra Holiday Park this Easter was nothing short of tragic. We arrived with good intentions, full of warmth and politeness, only to be met with humiliation and degrading treatment from the moment we stepped in.

The experience turned from disappointing to deeply offensive when one of the staff referred to my mother as “the dark one.” This blatant racism left us shaken and angry. My mother, who had shown nothing but kindness, was understandably unable to stay calm after being subjected to such disrespect.

We had arrived with proper documentation explaining the necessity of our dog, who supports my young sister’s severe anxiety and acts as a companion animal. Despite this, we were called liars and accused of forging our documents. The staff dismissed our child’s needs without a second thought, and we were constantly watched, harassed, and made to feel like intruders instead of guests.

Our dog, who was doing nothing but quietly staying near our family as trained, was treated like a threat. Bill repeatedly demanded we move or adjust things without even giving us a chance to comply. It felt more like a power play than actual concern.

We were not only disrespected as guests, but targeted personally and culturally. Accusations and threats were thrown at us by the management, including personal insults and incredibly inappropriate remarks about “blacklisting” and even mocking our concerns about mental health and family safety.

This was meant to be a relaxing Easter getaway, but instead we left feeling degraded, unwelcome, and violated. No family should go through what we did — especially not children who deserve to feel safe on holiday.

Avoid this place at all costs if you value kindness, respect, and basic human decency.

Its worth staying there so hygienic and clean place with lots of things for kids to be busy
Pool
Playground
Gaming zone room
And beautiful walkway

Great room, clean, cosy & quiet.
Lovely hosts.
Fabulous that we could bring the dog.
Nice park. Lady in the office was very nice and helpful. Only down side was on check in after the office. FYI, nobody likes to be treated like a 4 year old idiot Wayne.

Upon check in we were “told” by the manager that he would open the boom gate for us, walk us to our site and then “assist” with backing our van onto the site.||This was not a simple offer of assistance, this was a demand and when my husband thanked him and declined the assistance (he is quite capable of backing our van), he was called arrogant by the manager who then continued to behave like a petulant child whose mother never said NO to him.||I also to.d him several times through the check in process that I was vision impaired and would take all the paperwork and local information to my husband to read. He ignored this information and continued to point at documents I was unable to read.||Advice and assistance are always welcome but please be aware that people have the right to decline both.||Customer service not a high priority. Controlling seems to be the order of the day at this park.||And whilst I love doggos, there were quite a few poops near the garbage that had not been picked up. This did make the flies pretty bad at our van, which was near.||Other than that Lakes Entrance is a lovely little town. We would be happy to return, and stay somewhere else.

Lovely place to stay when on a drive along the coastal road. Short walk to the board walk and the walk to see the seals. Shame things all shut early around when there as seemed like a nice place and struggled for food choices
Great cabins,facilities, staff and respectful guests.
Was an excellent stay for me and my partner and our puppy

The location is great and the hosts and staff friendly and helpful.
The cabin was clean and had everything we needed during our stay. The bed was very comfortable and the shower water pressure excellent. We booked last minute and considered the rate very reasonable for a busy long weekend. Thank you for an enjoyable stay.

We had a pleasant stay and the staff were very friendly and helpful. The amenities were old but clean and everything worked.
Paul

Very clean place ,inside our room and outside in the park itself all amenities were spotless kid friendly...all the staff working in the park are very friendly and happy to help with any needs ....highly recommend

Don’t go there🤦🏻‍♂️. We were traveling with a pet so we didn’t expect the Taj mehal but we didn’t expect a smelly dirty outdated cabin that didn’t even look like it was cleaned from the last people unfortunate enough to be in there. Booked in and booked out as soon as we walked in to the Cabin. It was our seventh pet friendly accommodation on our way from Brisbane to Melbourne and the only one we had trouble with. Wasn’t even offered a partial refund? Nothing ! Stay away at all cost.

Our visit was just as good as before . The management still guide you to your site and if you have trouble with reversing a van they are willing to assist . The cleaners do a fantastic job and the amenities were kept very clean . A nice clean park with plenty of room and we look forward to returning again

Perfect stop traveling by car up to Brisbane with my Husband and 2 & a bit year old. Awsome location, beach directly across road. 5 minute walk to footbridge and awesome park & the shops. The service was 10/10 Monica was so helpful pre and during our stay. The room and park amenities especially for the price were super impressive. Everything you need! Pool, camp kitchens, and playground was an absolute hit. The games room was also impressive although not as relevant to us. Would definitely stay again and for more than one night!

We don't normally write reviews, but these manager's Truly motivated me to review them and give potential guest a heads up before committing to stay here. Our first concern was that we were not allowed to drive in by ourselves using the site map but we had to follow one of the staff to our site. I could live with this but when my wife returned to retrieve washing from washing machine in the laundry she found the door locked and a fresh sign on the door informing her of the closing time. So our clothes were now locked in the laundry overnight but what is worse is that the managers were sitting on their deck watching my wife attemtping to retreive the washing and rather then saying hey can we help they said yeh sorry as you can see by the sign the laundry is closed. my wife's response was that the sign was not there before and they confirmed yeh we just put it up. So in short they knew that there was a load of washing in the landry and they made a conscious effect to lock us out forcing us to rewash the load in the morning. Absolutley terrible operators who are control freaks. don't make the mistake we made stay away from this park.
Great friendly service and clean rooms. Even given an upgrade. Would stay again. Great prices.

Great spot. The cabin was clean, had a fresh smell to it. Air conditioner worked great and hubby loved the hot water in the shower. Staff and residents were friendly and helpful. Great to have somewhere we can take the dogs. Highly recommend this place. We will be back  10 out of 10
Great place to stay.

Bill and everyone at koonwarra were wonderful.
The amenities were great.
Excellent location for food and walks

Don’t book this place unless you are absolutely sure you will stay here. Booking says I’ll not charged till few days before check in date, but I was charged the next day after booking. Then I cancelled the booking because who knows what will happen later since they don’t respect the rules. In the end I lost more than 10 dollars due to currency conversions.
After dealing with the incompetence of the managers to simply get the booking dates right, I'm not interested if seeing if this extends to the actual management of the park.
Nice park, clean amenities good service
100% perfect
I injoyed  my say park was lovely   very clean will stay here again room didn't have anoth dishes in it 🙃 😅 🙂 😑

Great location and super friendly people! Was made to feel welcome from the moment we arrived. We had booked a pet friendly cabin, and everything was as promised. Definitely coning back to this location!

Love it.
Simple, clean, and very friendly
Great place to stay
Netjes maar het was wel koud☺️

Really loved our time here. The two bedroom two story villa was perfect. We were traveling with others who had a caravan and Bill and Monica were able to arrange for their site to be next to the cabin. We would definitely recommend this park.
Bit out of the shopping area, but such a beautiful short stroll to get there, the Wildlife is awesome

被亂扣了髒亂費用，正常使用過的痕跡也要叫做髒亂的話還需要房務人員？
碗盤垃圾都有洗 丟在垃圾桶裡還要被扣髒亂費
這是我住過最爛的住宿
給一顆星我還嫌多
Wife根本連不上 有夠爛

This is the worst hotel I have ever stayed in. We washed all our dishes and didn't leave any trash around, yet they claimed this was messy and charged us an extra fee. If normal signs of use are considered messy, then there is no need for housekeeping staff.
Btw, wifi sucks

不要住
會亂扣錢
感受很差

Such a nice park. owners are lovely.
i had a booking 12 months ago and couldn't go due to illness. they held the credit for me - no issues -
definitely going back.  Puppies loved it too
The accommodation was sparkling clean, and the bed was extremely comfy.  Everything was perfect, and the Owners are friendly and helpful.
stayed 10day Auction beautiful pk great facilities
We had to cancel our booking due to certain unforeseen circumstances, I spoke to Monica- She is very accommodating and understood our situation and provided us a refund!

We had a fantastic stay here. The service was impeccable and so accommodating. They helped sort out the booking for my family (that I stuffed up). I can't fault them for everything that they did. 10/10.

Didn't actually stay! However, some confusion with friendly rooms - owner phoned to confirm issue and mutually agreed to cancel without any charges or hassles - cancel completed via website in 30seconds. Terrific service and easy to deal with.
Fantastic staff, facilities are ALWAYS clean! We love Lakes Entrance, my kids have great memories here. Thank you for having us!

Great park! Guided to site (thanks Dave) and assisted onto site easily.  Fabulous facilities, (all work), great pool, generous sized sites. Nice walk into town along the waterfront. Lovely stay. Appreciate all the effort from the site team, everything was organised, clean and well maintained. Thankyou!
Nice park
Very clean,very friendly, and heaps of things to do around the area

Beautiful staff, Monica and Bill are lovely ☺️

We have stayed here several times now and the rooms are always clean and tidy, whilst they are quite dated and need a bit of work/love (comfier mattresses) they are perfect for a night or two away.

Perfect location and a bit more of a quiet holiday park in comparison to some others.

Good prices too

Will be back again

We camped here for 10 days in our van. It’s one of the nicest parks we have been to. So friendly and helpful. The amenities were very clean. The park was constantly being cleaned up and in good condition. There is a pool and children’s playground and several camp kitchens. Close to town and over the road there is a lovely walk.

Really like this place. Just a comfortable walk from the carnival and the shops. The amenities are clean. Sites have plenty of grass or a slab. Sites are a good size.  The management had been fantastic. They will help with parking..as can be a little tight in some areas(we have a larger van)...but no worries. Decent pool and a good games room. We will return.
Very pleasant stay here, spacious rooms and bbq area, pool and small playground. Very suitable for families. It’s around 1km from the town centre.

A really nice spot to rest and near enough to walk to the beach (approx 20mins). Towels were huge and the rooms and pool were very well kept. The people managing the place were also very friendly. Parking is a little tight for some of the accommodation though.

Due to emergency car repairs regrettably we had to cancel our booking at very short notice. I spoke with the owner, Bill, who waived the cancellation fee and offered a full refund, which we are incredibly grateful for. We are looking forward to booking another stay here in the near future. Thank you Bill for your amazing customer service and flexibility.

Very clean one bedroom cabin, perfect for a short stay. The fact they provided a portacot was a big bonus. ||Only downside was that for our cabin parking was out the front, which blocked the entrance to the cabin and made getting a pram etc difficult getting in and out.
WiFi was not working most of the time.
Highly recommend great stay
Excellent caravan park. Excellent site that had plenty of room for our larger van. Nice amenities block.

Very well located where you can just walk across the street to the foot paths that take you right into Lakes Entrance and the footbridge to 90 mile Beach.
Staff  wonderfully helpful. we had one of the older units which was beautifully clean and comfortable. Parked motorbikes directly outside which was secure. Very good value

Stayed on a ensuite site and the ensuite though a bit outdated was very clean and plenty of storage. When we arrived the manager walked down with us and directed my partner reversing onto the site. Staff were lovely and very helpful, caravan park was very clean and well maintained. :)

excellent service
very affordable
very polite and humble staff
very food maintain and clean
provide almost everything
feels like home 🏡
u can park ur car at front of ur room

Very basic facility. No additional towels or sheets were provided.

The swimming pool was not clean.

The kids game room was chargeable, but none of them functioned even after getting the coins
A big tick is a huge clean BBQ areas with all facilities available. Clean rooms, toilet and bathroom.
Cosy cabin, clean and very well priced. Great amenities and a very tidy park with child friendly things to do. Office staff very helpful and lovely to talk to. Highly recommended.
Great place for a holiday with very friendly staff.

Excellent Park wish I had come here sooner, was at another Park that was so so. Great people, we stayed a week and extended.
That was early 2019.
Stayed again from November 2019 to end August 2020, we are full time caravaners and were trapped by fire then covid, we were extremely well looked after and were given consideration to stay after Park was shut down.
We love it here close to everything and great walks etc.

Great caravan park . The sites are spacious and you are guided to your site and helped with putting your van on the site . The amenities are always clean  and the grounds are constantly being mowed . Will be back again

We rang the park when we bout 20 mins away, got a caravan booking straight away, Monica & Bill were extremely friendly & helpful
Beautiful park & surroundings & facilities

LOVE BENSON.  ❤️❤️❤️🐶🐶🐶

Stayed here for work for several weeks, what a gem this place is. The staff are so lovely and the cabin was clean, cozy and had all the ammenities you could want and need. Great location, definitely recommend for work or a holiday!
